ProjectAssets.title: ProjectAssets

allowExecutionReordering.description: Allow Hex to reorder, parallelize, or ignore cell runs based on its understanding of cell dependencies.

appTheme.description: Theme used by the published app.

autoRerunApp.description: Whether the published app should automatically run when opened.

cachePublishedAppState.description: Whether to cache the default state for the published app.

castDecimalsDefault.description: Whether SQL cells should cast decimal values by default.

categories.description: Unique identifiers of all categories associated with the project (optional).

codeLanguage.description: Programming language for code cells (PYTHON or R).

hexType.description: Whether this file represents a project, component, or explore.

kernelImage.description: Kernel image (Python/R version) the project runs under. Preserved across export/import so the runtime version stays stable. On import, an image the workspace doesn't recognize falls back to the workspace default.

kernelSize.description: Kernel size (compute profile) configured for this project. On import, a size the workspace isn't entitled to falls back to the workspace default.

logicQueryCacheTimeout.description: Query result cache timeout used while editing project logic.

prerunApp.description: Whether the published app should prerun cells in the background.

projectId.description: Stable project identifier used to match this project during import. Changing it will create a new project instead of updating the existing one.

publishedQueryCacheTimeout.description: Query result cache timeout used by the published app.

refreshStalePublishedApp.description: Whether to refresh the default app session if it is stale.

sourceVersionId.description: Stable version identifier used to match the exported project version during import. Changing it may prevent Hex from restoring related assets from the source version.

timezone.description: The project timezone. If null, falls back to the workspace timezone. Affects Chart cell output and the value of the `hex_timezone` variable for the project.

SharedAssets.description: Workspace-level assets referenced by this project, such as shared data connections, secrets, and packages.

dataConnections.description: Data connections linked to this project

externalFileIntegrations.description: External file integrations linked to this project

secrets.description: Shared secrets imported into this project

vcsPackages.description: Shared VCS packages imported into this project

defaultColumnWidth.description: What the default width of the columns should be (optional)

defaultSortColumn.description: Default column by which to sort the table (optional)

defaultSortDirection.description: Default sort direction for the table (optional)

defaultSortIndexColumn.description: Default index column by which to sort the table (optional)

hiddenColumns.description: Default hidden columns for the table

hideIcons.description: Whether the icons for the headers in this table should be hidden (optional)

hideIndex.description: Whether the index column for this table should be hidden (optional)

pinnedColumns.description: Default pinned columns for the table
